comment.body:
Investor psychology has a long way to go before it’s given up completely. Recalling Dec 2022 and how even great stocks were basically no bid. I remember thinking how Palo Alto networks was falling continuously and it has always been a strong business. 

When people are feeling like nothing is worth investing in for weeks and weeks, I think we will be close to the bottom

comment.body:
I quickly went through the chat.
Well... as I see it's time to re-read my weekend post, geopost, and today post ;))
I have a lot of hints by the way that seemingly you misses, like in today as well (a book title, for example).

Down is down. Not up.
Lower vol = higher liquidity.
Liquidity hunt is "looking for liquidity".
This is the first day after a huge overnight gap. 
Funds are margin called, risk parities are decreasing their long exposures, and quant traders are trying to take it, not letting a vol squeeze, nor trading curb, bcs as said they want a steady and coordinated decline. not an uncontrolled squeeze.
Everything you see in the media is a theater. 
I purposely posted a lot of political post on twitter in the past months. Plp don't listen.
They will losten when these events already happened. 
Fake non-sense furus and interviews everywhere. I know whats going on. They will appreaciate me, only after i'm gone.
and not here to steal and copy me... 
..or learn.

So take your time to re-read my post.
And give the market some time to have its "brake" effect. Like when you want to stop a car in an icy road. It is not instant!

comment.body: Well, today is a classic intraday momentum with no reversal on the way down. Dealer positioning is in short gamma meaning if the market keep going down with no volatility set backs, de-leveraging flow will come from all four fronts  1. systematic community funds 2. volatility targeting strategies 3. Levered ETFs daily rebalancing flow 4. CTA not even start buying at this level as their momentum signals (sharp ratio) not giving any green lights.

comment.body:
What Makes a Negotiation Genius?
A negotiation genius isn’t born with innate talents but rather develops specific skills through systematic preparation and strategic execution. According to Malhotra and Bazerman, a negotiation genius is someone who can consistently negotiate successful deals while preserving their integrity and strengthening relationships. These individuals don’t rely on gut instincts or improvisation but instead prepare thoroughly and systematically to achieve consistently superior outcomes. The authors emphasize that successful negotiation isn’t about intuition but rather careful preparation and sound strategy implementation. They define the ultimate goal of negotiation not simply as achieving win-win outcomes but creating value so both sides are better off with an agreement than without it.
The foundation of negotiation genius rests on three core components: a comprehensive toolbox of strategies, a solid conceptual framework, and a sound psychological approach to the negotiation process. By mastering these elements, anyone can develop the skills necessary to navigate even the most challenging negotiation scenarios with confidence and success.

Need to find time for the book

comment.body:
I quickly went through the chat.
Well... as I see it's time to re-read my weekend post, geopost, and today post ;))
I have a lot of hints by the way that seemingly you misses, like in today as well (a book title, for example).

Down is down. Not up.
Lower vol = higher liquidity.
Liquidity hunt is "looking for liquidity".
This is the first day after a huge overnight gap. 
Funds are margin called, risk parities are decreasing their long exposures, and quant traders are trying to take it, not letting a vol squeeze, nor trading curb, bcs as said they want a steady and coordinated decline. not an uncontrolled squeeze.
Everything you see in the media is a theater. 
I purposely posted a lot of political post on twitter in the past months. Plp don't listen.
They will losten when these events already happened. 
Fake non-sense furus and interviews everywhere. I know whats going on. They will appreaciate me, only after i'm gone.
and not here to steal and copy me... 
..or learn.

So take your time to re-read my post.
And give the market some time to have its "brake" effect. Like when you want to stop a car in an icy road. It is not instant!
